asset.title: Startup Diligence Live Join
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The video successfully demonstrates a multi-user live join workflow in a startup diligence room, showing room creation, code sharing, and real-time collaboration.

featureClarity.evidence: The flow of creating a room, copying the code, and having other users join is clearly depicted.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the complete lifecycle from room creation to multi-user collaboration and chat interaction.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark-themed interface is modern and structured, though the layout is highly dense.

consistency.evidence: Aligns well with NodeRoom's core concepts of shared artifacts, room traces, and collaborative agents.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured directly from a live browser session with realistic user interactions and state updates.

legibility.evidence: Some UI text and chat messages are small, but key actions and captions remain readable.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial and diligence teams requiring real-time collaborative workspaces.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the actual UI state changes and multi-user synchronization without simulated effects.

observedEvidence: Real-time updates in the Room Trace log

defects.observed: The dense UI layout makes some sidebar text elements and room trace events small and hard to read.
defects.fix: Slightly increase the default font size or zoom level of the browser during recording.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch how multiple team members seamlessly join a shared startup-banking diligence room in real-time using a secure room code.
